name: I'm on top of the head, offshore I see an atoll
description: I'm on top of the head, offshore I see an atoll
hints: On top of the stone head! An atoll is visible offshore.
You need a raft to reach the atoll. Look for building materials.
Build a raft from logs and vines, then paddle to the atoll.
D=main beach (1). The atoll (room 15) requires a raft.
notes: Top of stone head. View of atoll (room 15). D=beach (1). Need raft to reach atoll.
